help.title: Gameplay Help
stats: Very low hunger makes your pet hungry. Use food items to recover it.
Mood affects sleep and interaction rewards. A good mood can earn hearts.
Low cleanliness adds stress. Use cleaning actions or care items to recover it.
Energy limits play, work, and focus. Sleep or some items can restore it.
Low health blocks Pomodoro and some actions. Use care actions or medicine to recover.
actions: Play raises mood, but spends energy and hunger. Weather and repeated interaction can change the result.
Clean raises cleanliness and a little health, with extra changes from weather, seasons, and achievements.
Work earns coins. Rewards can be affected by level, weather, seasons, boost cards, and achievements.
Sleep restores energy faster and may settle sleep, dreams, or natural-wake rewards.
Inventory items can feed, gift, care for your pet, or plant and boost things in the garden.
other: Schedules, daily rewards, weather, and daily counters reset at 5:00 local time. Birthdays, meeting anniversaries, festivals, and monthly gifts follow calendar dates and can be claimed for three days after the event.
The shop sells food, gifts, care, and garden items. Claim a free soda biscuit daily and exchange hearts for coins; Friend and Best Friend Passes provide timed bonuses and a daily neighbor gift.

Daily wishes and return tasks grant rewards after completion. Offline diaries and random events may bring neighbor gifts or gacha tickets; an offline ticket has a 1% chance to become a ten-pull reward, and all daily sources share three ticket-grant slots.
Pomodoro cycles focus and breaks. Completed focus grants coins and mood, while low energy or health pauses the timer.
The garden lets you unlock slots, plant trees, water, fertilize, upgrade tools, and harvest. Item trees with no harvests left become withered.
Partner schedules unlock at Lv.3 and allow up to three completions per day. Four skills grow to Lv.10, then track master completions; finishing all three daily schedules also grants a gacha ticket.
Golden Apple Gacha accepts coins or tickets and includes a one-time starter gift of 10 tickets. Golden apples care for your partner and are also important Partner Dreams materials.
Achievements, birthdays, anniversaries, festivals, and yearly reviews grant special rewards. At Lv.20, Partner Dreams lead to trophies and long-term legacy levels.
Settings include save management, language, audio, and mods. Mods can replace visuals/text and add safe custom items.

extraYear.title: Year {year} Good Ending
extraYear.description: Another gentle, steady year of companionship was recorded.

first_feed.title: First Bite
first_feed.description: Feed your pet or use a food item for the first time.

first_clean.title: Fresh and Fluffy
first_clean.description: Clean your pet or use a cleaning item for the first time.

first_play.title: Let's Play
first_play.description: Play with your pet for the first time.

first_touch.title: Head Pats
first_touch.description: Pat your pet for the first time.

first_work.title: Tiny Worker
first_work.description: Complete work for the first time.

first_sleep.title: Rest Well
first_sleep.description: Let your pet enter sleep for the first time.

first_gift.title: Gift Time
first_gift.description: Use a gift item for the first time.

care_25.title: A Familiar Rhythm
care_25.description: Perform any care action 25 times in total.

care_100.title: Closer Every Day
care_100.description: Perform any care action 100 times in total.

daily_wish_7.title: An Unrushed Habit
daily_wish_7.description: Claim 7 daily wish rewards in total.

daily_wish_30.title: Wishes Add Up
daily_wish_30.description: Claim 30 daily wish rewards in total.

daily_wish_100.title: A Daily Promise
daily_wish_100.description: Claim 100 daily wish rewards in total.

return_welcome_1.title: Companion Mark
return_welcome_1.description: Earn 1 companion mark. Each return reward or every 30 cumulative active days grants 1 mark.

daily_login_7.title: Just Passing By
daily_login_7.description: Claim daily login rewards 7 times. They do not need to be consecutive.

daily_login_30.title: A Month Together
daily_login_30.description: Claim daily login rewards 30 times. They do not need to be consecutive.

garden_first_plant.title: First Planting
garden_first_plant.description: Successfully plant 1 tree in the garden.

garden_tree_catalogue.title: Master Gardener
garden_tree_catalogue.description: Harvest the fruit, care, gift, money, and golden apple trees at least once each.

garden_tools_max.title: Tool Expert
garden_tools_max.description: Upgrade the watering can, shovel, and fertilizer box to level 3.

schedule_10.title: Finding a Rhythm
schedule_10.description: Claim 10 partner schedule rewards in total.

schedule_50.title: Schedule Expert
schedule_50.description: Claim 50 partner schedule rewards in total.

schedule_all_categories.title: All-Rounder
schedule_all_categories.description: Claim at least 1 reward from study, cooking, garden, and exercise schedules.

schedule_long_5.title: Long-Term Plan
schedule_long_5.description: Complete and claim 5 long schedule rewards.

schedule_long_all_categories.title: Four Long Roads
schedule_long_all_categories.description: Complete and claim at least 1 long schedule reward in every category.

schedule_daily_three.title: Full Itinerary
schedule_daily_three.description: Complete 3 partner schedules on the same day.

schedule_all_skills_3.title: Skilled in Four
schedule_all_skills_3.description: Raise all 4 partner schedule skills to level 3.

schedule_all_skills_6.title: Four Skills Refined
schedule_all_skills_6.description: Raise all 4 partner schedule skills to level 6.

schedule_all_skills_max.title: Ultimate Partner
schedule_all_skills_max.description: Raise all 4 partner schedule skills to level 10.

schedule_all_master_10.title: Master of Four Paths
schedule_all_master_10.description: After all 4 partner schedule skills reach level 10, complete 10 master schedules in each category.

first_purchase.title: First Purchase
first_purchase.description: Buy a non-free item for the first time.

purchase_20.title: Restocking the Little Pantry
purchase_20.description: Buy or claim items 20 times in total.

paid_purchase_100.title: Shop Regular
paid_purchase_100.description: Buy non-free items 100 times in total.

fruit_taster.title: Fruit Taster
fruit_taster.description: Use orange, apple, banana, and watermelon once each.

watermelon_first.title: A Bite of Summer
watermelon_first.description: Use watermelon for the first time.

care_kit.title: Care Kit
care_kit.description: Use wet wipes, shampoo, and vitamin tablet once each.

pomodoro_day_4.title: Focused Today
pomodoro_day_4.description: Complete 4 focus phases in the same day.

natural_wake_10.title: Woke Naturally
natural_wake_10.description: Let your pet wake naturally 10 times.

sleep_rhythm_30.title: Regular Rhythm
sleep_rhythm_30.description: Start sleep and wake naturally 30 times each.

rare_trusted_companion.title: Trusted Companion
rare_trusted_companion.description: Stay together for 30 days and be active for 10 days in total.

rare_fruit_collector.title: Fruit Collector
rare_fruit_collector.description: Use orange, apple, banana, and watermelon 3 times each.

rare_gentle_caretaker.title: Gentle Caretaker
rare_gentle_caretaker.description: Feed, clean, play, and pat 50 times each.

companion_100.title: Hundred-Day Partner
companion_100.description: Stay together for 100 days and be active for 60 days in total.

fruit_master.title: Fruit Master
fruit_master.description: Use orange, apple, banana, and watermelon 20 times each.

hidden_never_give_you_up.title: never give you up
hidden_never_give_you_up.description: Earn 3 companion marks. Return rewards and every 30 cumulative active days each grant 1 mark.

hidden_never_let_you_down.title: never let you down
hidden_never_let_you_down.description: Earn 10 companion marks. Return rewards and every 30 cumulative active days each grant 1 mark.

hidden_quiet_companion.title: Quiet Companion
hidden_quiet_companion.description: Be active for 100 days in total.

hidden_prepared_bag.title: Prepared Bag
hidden_prepared_bag.description: Keep more than 10 items in the bag.

hidden_hoarder.title: Hoarder
hidden_hoarder.description: Keep more than 50 items in the bag.

hidden_big_watermelon.title: Merge Big Watermelon
hidden_big_watermelon.description: Use orange, apple, and banana 20 times each.

hidden_good_friend.title: Good Friend
hidden_good_friend.description: Buy 90 total days of Best Friend Pass.

hidden_full_catalogue.title: Task Master
hidden_full_catalogue.description: Complete at least 80% of normal achievements to unlock.
